title: Asbestos and Silica Safety and Eradication Agency
description: The Asbestos and Silica Safety and Eradication Agency administers the Asbestos National Strategic Plan and the Silica National Strategic Plan and oversees national actions to monitor and improve awareness of asbestos safety, asbestos related diseases, silica safety and silica related diseases.
